use_cases: Displaying hierarchical navigation paths in web applications to show users their current location
Enabling quick navigation back to parent pages or sections in multi-level content structures
Providing accessibility-compliant breadcrumb trails with proper ARIA attributes for screen readers
Supporting overflow handling with ellipsis for deeply nested navigation hierarchies
ai_summary: A composite breadcrumb navigation component for React applications that provides hierarchical page location indicators. Features a collection of sub-components (Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis) with accessibility support including ARIA labels and semantic HTML structure. Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, minimalist appearance with hover state transitions.
